The "'''technology-deficient planet'''" was a technologically primitive [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]], or [[Near-Human]]s. Their technology had not developed beyond the use of [[Horse/Legends|horses]], [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]], and metal [[Sword/Legends|swords]]. They had no advanced technology whatsoever.

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once crash-landed there and ended up solving a national crisis of one of the kingdoms of the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
